fsymId.description: FactSet Entity Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with a -E suffix (XXXXXX-E).

requestId.description: Identifier that was used for the request.

subTopicCode.description: Codes for the General, Mandatory and Additional PAI indicators

indicatorType.description: The type of indicator - General, Additional & Mandatory

periodEndDate.description: The Reporting period end date expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format

standardizedUnit.description: The units of measurements for the indicators

standardizedValue.description: The PAI calculations based on the company-reported data, some metrics sourced from Factset Databases and Truvalue SASB Spotlights
